full_text:
Leng Bao 冷苞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Leng Bao (冷苞). Fought Wei Yan and Huang Zhong, he was captured twice. He was executed the second time. Leng Bao was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
